tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single Robot Framework test produces valid, complete documentation output with the correct framework identified and at least one named test.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool successfully processes a Robot Framework file and displays results to the user

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders and variables in the output are fully resolved — nothing is left blank or templated

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON framework is 'robot'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output correctly identifies the test framework as Robot Framework

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 1 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one test case is extracted and represented in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each test in the output is properly named — no anonymous or missing test entries

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - Template data-driven expands one test per row
tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Robot Framework test using a Template keyword expands into one individual test entry per data row in the Product Owner output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool successfully processes a data-driven Robot Framework file and displays results

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All data row values are fully substituted — no raw variable references remain

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 3 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each data row produces its own separate test entry, confirming the expansion behaviour

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test is individually and meaningfully named

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - FOR loop expands one test per value
tests.description: Verifies that a Robot Framework test containing a FOR loop expands into one individual test entry per loop value in the Product Owner output.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool successfully processes a Robot Framework file with FOR loops and displays results

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All loop iteration values are fully resolved in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 3 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each FOR loop iteration produces its own separate test entry, confirming expansion behaviour

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test is individually and meaningfully named

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a single Robot Framework test in the QA Manager role produces a valid output that includes a populated test coverage matrix.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool successfully processes a Robot Framework file and displays results for a QA Manager

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All placeholders and variables in the output are fully resolved

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has 1 or more tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: At least one test case is extracted and represented in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each test in the output is properly named

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The QA Manager view includes a coverage matrix with at least one entry, providing traceability and coverage insight

tests.description: Verifies that a data-driven Robot Framework Template test is collapsed into a single test entry in the QA Manager view, with the coverage matrix capturing each data row as a separate row using the correct structure.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool successfully processes the data-driven file and displays results for a QA Manager

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All data values are fully resolved — no raw variable references remain

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has exactly 1 test
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Data-driven tests are collapsed into a single logical test entry rather than expanded, matching the QA Manager perspective

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage matrix has one row per data example, preserving full data visibility within the single test entry

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'robot'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected Robot Framework-specific data structure

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - QAM - FOR loop collapses
tests.description: Verifies that Robot Framework tests containing FOR loops are collapsed in the QA Manager view, with coverage matrix rows correctly representing each loop iteration.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The tool successfully processes a Robot Framework file with FOR loops and displays results for a QA Manager

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All loop iteration values are fully resolved in the output

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has exactly 2 tests
test_coverage.what_it_checks: FOR loop iterations are collapsed into a smaller number of logical test entries rather than fully expanded, matching the QA Manager perspective

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix row count matches the examples
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage matrix captures each loop iteration as its own row, preserving full iteration visibility

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for 'robot'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each coverage matrix row conforms to the expected Robot Framework-specific data structure
